items.name: FMC Asia 2019

wcaDelegates.name: Tanai Chaikraveephand (ธนัย ชัยกระวีพันธ์)

items.information:
**YOU MUST INCLUDE THE LOCATION YOU ARE ATTENDING IN YOUR REGISTRATION COMMENT.**

The competition will be held in multiple locations, Asia. Please pay attention to the **date and time zone** of your location!

Locations may be added until the 9th of November 23:59 UTC so if there isn't a location near you yet contact your local [Delegate](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/delegates) in Asia.

items.name: Malta Open 2019

venue.name: [The University of Malta](https://www.um.edu.mt/)
venue.address: Mathematics and Physics Building, University of Malta, Msida MSD 2080, Malta.

items.information:
This is the first WCA competition in Malta. It is an open competition for all people from all ages and all countries.
We hope many people from Malta and other countries will participate.

The competition also counts as the national championship for Malta.
So the best competitors from Malta will be the national champions 2019 of Malta.

Doors are open from 8:30am.

items.name: Cambodia Cubing Championship 2019

venue.name: [Cambodia-Japan Cooperation Center](http://www.cjcc.edu.kh/site/index.php/en/)
venue.address: Russian Confederation Blvd., Tuol Kork, Pnom Penh, Cambodia

items.information:
This is the first-ever national cubing championship of Cambodia.
We also have a Facebook groups for our Cubing Area. [Khmer Top Cuber](https://www.facebook.com/groups/KhmerCuber/). You can join the group to stay updated with upcoming competitions in the area.

items.name: Sarajevo Open 2019
items.information:
Sarajevo Open 2019 is a speedcubing competition. Anyone can participate, who is familiar with the WCA Regulation, accepts it and meet the competition’s criterias.


Sarajevo Open 2019 je speedcubing takmičenje. Svako ko poznaje WCA pravila i ispunjava WCA zahtjeve može da učestvuje na takmičenju.

items.information:
Competencia que se desarrolla por quinta vez en Quetzaltenango. Con el objetivo principal de aumentar la comunidad en esta area del pais y asi promover mas el speedcubing. 


Competition that takes place for the fifth time in Quetzaltenango. With the main objective of increasing the community in this area of the country and thus promote more speedcubing.

items.name: Madagascar Cubing Open 2019
items.information:
Madagascar will host for the first time a WCA competition !

Only Malagasy competitors are eligible for prizes and podiums.
_____
Madagascar accueillera pour la première fois une compétition de la WCA !

Seulement les compétiteurs Malgaches sont eligibles pour les prix et podiums.

items.name: Nigeria Open 2019

venue.name: [Lycée Français Louis Pasteur](https://www.lflp-lagos.com)
venue.address: 16 Younis Bashorun Street, Victoria Island, Lagos, Nigeria
venue.details: Room: Salle des Droits de l'Homme

items.information:
You're asked to have read the [WCA regulations](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/), the tutorial at the competition is here to remind them to you!
It is very important to attend to at least one of the tutorials so that you can understand how the competition goes and to avoid incidents!

The competition is open to all competitors, of all ages and all nationalities!

items.name: Zagreb Cube Day 2019

venue.name: [Prva Gimnazija Zagreb](https://www.prva.hr/)
venue.details: Competition will be held in the main hall. / Natjecanje će biti održano u glavnoj prostoriji škole.

items.information:
(HR)

Zagreb Cube Day 2019 je dvanaesto natjecanje po redu koje se održava u Hrvatskoj od 2011. godine. Bilo tko može sudjelovati, bez obzira na nacionalnost i
starost, no svatko mora biti upoznat s WCA Pravilnikom.

Natjecanje je pod organizacijom Udruge Speedcubing Hrvatska. Kotizacija pokriva trošak organizacije i najma prostora. Mogući višak kotizacije ide u svrhu razvitka Udruge Speedcubing Hrvatska.

--------------

(EN)

Zagreb Cube Day 2019 is the 12th speedcubing competition being held in Croatia since 2011. Anyone can participate, no matter which nationality or age they are, but they need to be familiar with the WCA Regulations.

This competition is being organized by the Speedcubing Association Croatia. Registration fee covers the cost of the organization and venue rental. Any extra money goes directly to support Speedcubing Association Croatia.

items.name: Villa Carlos Paz Otoño 2019

venue.name: Iglesia Vida Con Proposito
venue.address: Gabriela Mistral 549, Chincheta, Villa Carlos Paz, Córdoba

items.information:
VCP Otoño 2019 will be the second competition ever to be hosted in the province of Córdoba, Argentina. It will last two days and it will feature thirteen WCA events.

VCP Otoño 2019 será la segunda competencia realizada en la Provincia de Córdoba, Argentina. Constará de dos días y se podrá competir en trece categorías distintas.

items.name: Serbian Open 2019

venue.name: [Mathematical Grammar School](https://www.mg.edu.rs)
venue.details: Pratite znakove da dođete do hale. / Follow the signs to the venue.

items.information:
Serbian Open 2019 je speedcubing takmičenje. Svako moze da se takmiči, nezavisno od njihove nacionalnosti ili godina, ali moraju biti upoznati sa WCA Regulacijama. Ovo takmičenje je priznato i kao Srpsko Nacionalno Prvenstvo.

------------------------

Serbian Open 2019 is a speedcubing competition. Anyone can participate, no matter which nationality or age they are, but they need to be familiar with the WCA Regulations. This competition is also recognized as a Serbian National Championship.

items.name: Lights of Reykjavik 2019
items.information:
**Walk in registrations will be allowed until we reach the limit of registration**

Space in the venue is limited, please let us know how many people will come with you.
You will have to pay the registration fees at the venue the day of the competition to participate: kr1500 (~11€)
________

Pláss á staðnum er takmarkað svo endilega látið okkur vita hversu marga gesti þið munuð hafa með ykkur.
Mótsgjald er 1500 krónur fyrir keppendur og verður það greitt á mótsdag.
________
.
